items.title: Tip of the week #16: How to create a board on monday.com
items.excerpt:
To create a board on monday.com: 

Click on the '+’ button on the left pane on your screen.
Select ‘Board’.
Next, select ‘New Board’.

  
You can also choose to import a new board from Excel, Google Sheets, Trello, and m…
